title: Diffusion Models explained..
summary: Caleb Writes Code and Julia Turc explain diffusion models, describing them as a process and framework rather than a fixed model architecture. The video covers the progression, strengths, weaknesses, and implementation details of diffusion, including how it can be implemented with transformers like DiT.
